messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Retire the legacy single-chat Telegram narrator and inbound relay — porting any signal the front desk does not already carry
What it solves: THE SITUATION. There are TWO Telegram systems in this repo:
  - The CONCIERGE FRONT DESK (BL-274+/BL-295+): forum topics, runs HEADLESS, confirmed live via
    `ps aux`. This is the real one.
  - The LEGACY SINGLE-CHAT NARRATOR + INBOUND RELAY:
    `extension/src/notify/telegramNarrator.ts:Telegram…
How it works: Every signal the legacy narrator sent still reaches the human

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-353 - Retire the legacy single-chat Telegram narrator and inbound relay — porting any signal the front desk does not already carry is complete.
